---
title: "ppCompositeUtil.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Legacy productivity composite helper utilities retained with the workflow.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/src/ppCompositeUtil.py >}}
```

:::
